evals.prompt: Replace any in this API helper with a truthful type. Prefer existing domain types and do not change runtime behavior.
evals.expected_behavior: Inventories any sites, reuses existing types when possible, chooses the narrowest truthful replacement (or unknown plus a guard at untrusted edges), avoids unsafe casts, and re-runs typecheck.
assertions: Replaces any with a more precise type or unknown-plus-narrowing rather than leaving it
Reuses an existing domain type, DTO, or helper when available
Avoids unsafe casts such as as unknown as to silence the compiler

evals.prompt: This any sits on a generated OpenAPI client type and an intentionally unstructured external payload. Remove any if safe.
evals.expected_behavior: Stops when the boundary is generated, vendor-owned, or intentionally permissive; prefers unknown plus a guard over inventing a fake precise type.
assertions: Does not force fake precision on generated or intentionally permissive boundaries
Mentions unknown plus narrowing or leaving the honest boundary alone

evals.prompt: Add runtime validation for this untrusted JSON webhook and derive the TypeScript type from the schema.
evals.expected_behavior: Routes away from pure any elimination when the real work is schema-boundary runtime validation.
assertions: Does not treat the task as only local any replacement
Routes toward schema-boundary-typing or runtime validation at the untrusted boundary
